name: cenfotech-frontend
description: Frontend para Cenfo-Tech con SASS y Bootstrap

scripts.sass:all: sass scss/index.scss css/index.css --watch & sass scss/home.scss css/home.css --watch & sass scss/tienda.scss css/tienda.css --watch & sass scss/carrito.scss css/carrito.css --watch & sass scss/admin.scss css/admin.css --watch
scripts.sass:build: sass scss/index.scss css/index.css --style=compressed & sass scss/home.scss css/home.css --style=compressed & sass scss/tienda.scss css/tienda.css --style=compressed & sass scss/carrito.scss css/carrito.css --style=compressed & sass scss/admin.scss css/admin.css --style=compressed

author: Cenfo-Tech
